ops.title: cc-notes unification Phase 6: ship release + verify fleet
ops.description: One stable release tag ships all unification phases; the ~25-repo workflow fleet heals at next run. Release notes must state the old-binary ErrKindMismatch behavior for anchor-edited/deleted runbooks. Never re-tag a published stable version. Plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/there-are-lots-of-steady-frost.md (Phase 6). Blocked by Phases 1-5.

ops.text: Stable tag on merged main; release workflow green; Homebrew tap formula bumped
E2e failure-shape script passes against the installed release binary in a scratch git repo
One fleet repo spot-checked after the tap bump
